compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect sub-agent guard pattern
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

**What**: Update CLAUDE.md to document the sub-agent guard pattern and the list of guarded skills.
**Why**: Future developers and agents need to know which skills are guarded and why, so they don't attempt to invoke them from sub-agent context.
**Scope**:
- IN: Update CLAUDE.md architecture section to document the guard pattern, list guarded skills, and describe the two guard variants
- OUT: Skill file changes (Stories 1 and 2)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md documents the sub-agent guard pattern, lists all 18 guarded skills by category (sub-agent dependent vs user-interaction dependent), and describes the expected error behavior
  <- Satisfies: "No existing orchestrator workflow breaks"
- When this story is complete, unit tests are written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Maintainability] Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for formatting
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Additional Consideration (adversarial review)

- [Testing] The 'unit tests written and passing' done definition needs clarification for a docs-only change. Options: (a) a test verifying CLAUDE.md mentions all 18 guarded skills by name, (b) rely on check-skill-refs.sh as validation, or (c) note that the guard-presence test from Story 1 constitutes the validation. Resolve during implementation-plan.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: CLAUDE.md updated with sub-agent guard pattern documentation.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
